name: King Arthur Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded coconut or flaked coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease and flour a 10-inch x 14-inch cake pan, or a 9-inch x 13-inch cake pan, or three 8-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs and sugar until light and fluffy, at least 2 minutes.
4. Blend together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in another bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture, alternating with milk or buttermilk, stirring just until combined.
6. Fold in shredded carrots, coconut, pineapple, nuts, and raisins (soaked in warm apple juice or brandy).
7. Pour batter into prepared pan(s) and bake for 35-40 minutes, 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool cake in pan for 10 minutes, then remove to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Frost with cream cheese frosting.
